prompt: I've been thinking about adding a plugin system to my app. Plugins would be loaded at runtime and could extend the UI and add new data sources. I want third-party developers to be able to create plugins too. Interview me about this — what am I not thinking about?
assertions: Questions target specific gaps rather than restating the four stated requirements
Questions use concrete failure scenarios or edge cases rather than abstract inquiries
Strategy explicitly plans to use AskUserQuestion one at a time
At least one question surfaces a non-obvious architectural concern (beyond obvious security/sandboxing)
Strategy includes a mid-interview checkpoint or summary to redirect the conversation
